inputs.label: Annual Demand (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total yearly demand for the product. Based on APICS/SCOR forecasting standards.

inputs.label: Ordering Cost per Order ($)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed cost per order (setup, paperwork, inspection). Lean/JIT principles emphasize reducing this cost.

inputs.label: Holding Cost per Unit per Year ($)
inputs.businessContext: Inventory carrying cost including storage, insurance, obsolescence. Typically 20-30% of unit cost.

inputs.label: Unit Cost ($)
inputs.businessContext: Purchase or production cost per unit. Used for financial calculations.

inputs.label: Lead Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Time from order placement to receipt. Critical for safety stock and reorder point.

inputs.label: Service Level (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired probability of not stocking out. Common values: 95% (z=1.65), 99% (z=2.33).

inputs.label: Demand Standard Deviation (units/day)
inputs.businessContext: Variability in daily demand. Used for safety stock calculation.

inputs.label: Working Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of operating days per year. Typically 250 for manufacturing.

thresholds.orderingCost: If orderingCost > 1000, consider process improvement to reduce setup costs.
thresholds.holdingCostPerUnitPerYear: If holdingCostPerUnitPerYear > 0.3 * unitCost, inventory carrying cost is high; review storage efficiency.
thresholds.serviceLevel: If serviceLevel > 99.5, safety stock may be excessive; consider cost-service trade-off.

hiddenLossDrivers: If orderingCost > 1000: High ordering cost inflates EOQ and total cost.
If holdingCostPerUnitPerYear > 0.3 * unitCost: Excessive holding cost erodes margins.
If serviceLevel > 99.5: Overly high service level increases safety stock and holding cost.
suggestedActions: Reduce ordering cost through automation or supplier consolidation.
Negotiate lower unit cost or improve inventory turnover.
Review service level target; consider lowering if cost savings outweigh stockout risk.
Implement demand forecasting to reduce demand variability.

premiumFeatures: Detailed report with charts and recommendations
